title: 2.24 M Washing Line Pole Telescopic, Heavy Duty Stainless Steel Washing Line Prop, Clothes Props for Washing Line Outside, Home Garden Clothes Line Prop Laundry Support
features: High Quality Materials: Washing line pole is made of stainless steel, which is windproof and rainproof. It will not rust even after years of use

Adjustable Length: Extendable clothes pole, each connecting rod is about 16 inches long, with a total of 4 connecting rods, a clothesline support rod and a grounding support rod. After connection, it can reach up to 2.24m. You can adjust it according to your height or the length required for clothes drying

Easy to Install: Clothes line prop adopts threaded connection, which is stable and will not shake. The bottom can be installed on the grounding base. The G-type head used on the head can easily hang the clothesline without falling
Heavy-duty Construction: The washing line pole is designed to be sturdy and durable, capable of holding the weight of wet clothes without bending or buckling

Lightweight & Portable: With its lightweight design, this prop is easy to carry, set up, and store. Whether used indoors or outdoors, its portability makes it perfect for quick hanging clothes setups, adding convenience to your laundry routine
